properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God I give You what I can today These scattered ashes that I hid away I lay them all at Your feet From the corners of my deepest shame

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The empty places where I've worn Your name Show me the love I say I believe Oh Help me to lay it down Oh Lord I lay it down

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh let this be where I die My Lord with Thee crucified Be lifted high as my kingdom's fall Once and for all, once and for all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is victory in my Saviors loss And in the crimson flowing from the cross Pour over me, pour over me yes

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Lord I lay it down Oh Lord I lay it down Help me to lay it down Oh Lord I lay it down

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh let this be where I die My Lord with Thee crucified Be lifted high as my kingdom's fall Once and for all Once and for all Oh once and for all Once and for all
